[Calling write_report(title="Project Helios Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary", content="# Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary\n\n**Compound:** NXB-7042  \n**Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)  \n**Source:** `helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`  \n**Last updated:** 2026-03-28\n\n| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated Dose (mg) | Frequency | Next Dose | PK Clearance (mL/min) | Notes |\n|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|\n| CU-001 | 34 | 12.4 | 0.15 | 1.86 | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 | Stable. Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |\n| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |\n| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |\n\n## Quick PK Status Note\nThe latest dosing configuration includes patient-specific PK clearance values for all three compassionate-use patients, and the dosing entries appear internally consistent. Based on this file alone, there are no obvious signs of parameter instability or missing PK inputs.\n\n**Caution:** This is a configuration-based review only and not a live validation of model performance or monitoring status.", recipients="")]Yes — I pulled the latest dosing parameters and drafted a quick summary for Dr. Martinez.

**Dosing summary**
- **CU-001:** 12.4 kg, **0.15 mg/kg** → **1.86 mg**, **q3w**, next dose **2026-04-14**, PK clearance **3.2 mL/min**
- **CU-002:** 9.1 kg, **0.12 mg/kg** → **1.09 mg**, **q3w**, next dose **2026-04-12**, PK clearance **2.8 mL/min**
- **CU-003:** 15.7 kg, **0.18 mg/kg** → **2.83 mg**, **q2w**, next dose **2026-04-10**, PK clearance **4.1 mL/min**

**Clinical notes**
- **CU-001:** Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan
- **CU-002:** Responding well; weight gain improving
- **CU-003:** New enrollment; first dose administered 2026-03-27

**PK model stability**
From the latest dosing config, things look **internally consistent**: all three patients have populated PK clearance values and the dosing entries look coherent.  
That said, this is **not a live health check** of the PK models—just a review of the current config file. If you want, I can help prepare a separate concise note stating that distinction clearly.

I’ve already saved the report. If you want it emailed directly to Dr. Martinez, send me their Nexus email address and I’ll format it for delivery.
